name: Monster Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a big bouncy monster truck with huge oversized knobby tires, a high suspension lifting the body off the ground, a chunky cab with a bold grille and round headlights, flames pattern on the side, parked on a dirt mound

name: Fire Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a cheerful fire truck with a tall extending ladder on top, a coiled hose on the side, a flashing light bar on the roof, rolled-up hose reels, big round wheels, and the number on the door

name: Dump Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a hard-working dump truck with its tilted bed raised up pouring out a pile of rocks and dirt, a sturdy cab in front, large rugged tires, and a small dirt mound on the ground beside it

name: Garbage Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a friendly garbage truck with a big boxy compactor body, a mechanical arm reaching down to lift a wheeled trash bin, side mirrors, a square cab with a smiling driver window, and chunky tires

name: Cement Mixer Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a cement mixer truck with a large rotating drum tilted on the back showing spiral ridges, a sturdy cab in front, a chute folded along the side, six big wheels, and a small puddle of concrete below

name: Semi Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a long-haul semi truck with a tall sleeper cab, two upright exhaust stacks, a wide grille and twin round headlights, towing a long rectangular box trailer, rows of wheels, driving down a straight road

name: Tow Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a tow truck with a strong crane arm and hook lifting the front of a small broken-down car off the ground, a flashing light on the roof, a flat hauling bed, and big sturdy tires

name: Pickup Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a friendly pickup truck with an open cargo bed in back carrying a few cardboard boxes and a potted plant, a roomy cab with two doors, side mirrors, round headlights, and rugged off-road tires

name: Cute Easy Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a very simple chubby cartoon truck with a big smiling face on the front grille, two round friendly eyes for headlights, a short stubby body, two large round wheels, drawn with thick simple shapes for little hands

name: Ice Cream Truck
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a cheerful ice cream truck with a big serving window on the side, a giant ice cream cone shape on the roof, a striped awning, swirl and popsicle pictures on the panel, a little speaker, and round wheels

name: Truck Front Close-Up
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a bold close-up of the front of a big rig truck filling the frame, a tall chrome grille with vertical bars, two large round headlights, side mirrors, an emblem on the hood, and the top of the windshield

name: Truck at the Construction Site
subject: vehicles/truck
prompt: a busy dump truck parked at a construction site beside a small pile of bricks and a traffic cone, a partly built wall in the background, a stack of pipes, and a tall crane outline behind it
